revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-075

Target tail

The display of diminishing luminance seen to follow a target on a P.P.I. which results from afterglow and the progress of the target between successive scans of the radar.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Target trail}}
